microsoft_ft: **Orchestrated Azure's recovery validation program** at scale, standardizing workflows across 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** for enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 delivery** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, empowered team execution.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivered a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation model.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, bridging product, platform, and sovereign-cloud infrastructure teams on a network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.

Built an **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — role-modeling AI-first execution to elevate org-wide delivery velocity.

Translated OKRs into coordinated execution plans across multi-team initiatives, using delivery health signals and outcome metrics to surface dependencies, manage risks, and keep cross-functional teams aligned on customer impact.

Shaped shared tools and delivery frameworks adopted across the resilience portfolio, contributing to how Azure executes at scale and coaching teams on data-driven operating rhythms that balanced autonomy with alignment.
microsoft_2023: **Drove product adoption** of AI-powered code generation workflows, leading demos and training that activated 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through sustainable flow improvements.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user research interviews** with Azure engineering teams, surfacing critical OKR-aligned feature gaps that led to intent-based YAML generation being prioritized for delivery.

Improved delivery predictability by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling data-driven team decision-making.
microsoft_2022: **Generated $3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on an automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams across product and platform domains.

Translated strategy into an execution roadmap by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch and mapping dependencies across critical automation paths.

Enabled leadership to drive outcome-aligned investment decisions by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that surfaced operational toil metrics and delivery health signals across 140+ teams in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by orchestrating a legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering on a shared execution plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, managing **cross-team dependency visibility** and resolving 40+ high-priority backlog tickets to restore flow and stabilize the developer intake process.

Bridged strategy to execution by aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing release friction.
pro_painters: **Increased job bookings by 26%** by redesigning end-to-end proposal and invoicing workflows, managing 200+ monthly scoping requests through a structured CRM process that improved delivery speed and accountability.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels and surfacing performance signals to guide investment decisions.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering outcome-focused recommendations that strengthened financial planning.
